news.headline: Evloev upsets Murphy, sets up featherweight title shot against Volkanovski
news.summary: Movsar Evloev rallies after a point deduction against the unbeaten Lerone Murphy to win the contest in London.

news.headline: Philippine military uncovers alleged new Beijing spy tactics in South China Sea row
news.summary:
At least three Filipinos with ties to the country’s military have been arrested on suspicion of spying for Beijing, allegedly leaking information that sparked maritime confrontations in the disputed South China Sea.

news.summary: Donald Trump has threatened to 'obliterate' Iran’s power plants if Tehran fails to open the Strait of Hormuz.

news.headline: Casualties as Israeli settlers set fire to homes and cars in West Bank
news.summary: Settlers set fire to homes and cars near Jenin amid reports of widespread violence across the occupied territory.

news.headline: Sri Lanka raises fuel prices by 25pc as US-Israel war on Iran bites
news.summary:
<p>Sri Lanka raised fuel prices by 25 per cent on Sunday, the second increase in two weeks, as the country prepared for more impact from the war in the Middle East.</p>

news.headline: Pakistan tops Global Terrorism Index with 6pc increase in terror-related deaths
news.summary:
<p>Pakistan has ranked number one on the Global Terrorism Index for the first time, recording a six per cent increase in terrorism-related deaths, 1,139, in 2025, it emerged on Sunday.</p>
